testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure loads files page
testcase.classname: loads files page

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows upload card with required inputs
testcase.classname: shows upload card with required inputs

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows target table select
testcase.classname: shows target table select

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure record select is disabled before table chosen
testcase.classname: record select is disabled before table chosen

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows Upload button
testcase.classname: shows Upload button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows upload status area
testcase.classname: shows upload status area

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows search input
testcase.classname: shows search input

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows file type filter with predefined options
testcase.classname: shows file type filter with predefined options

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure type filter includes All option
testcase.classname: type filter includes All option

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows Refresh button
testcase.classname: shows Refresh button

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure shows file table with headers
testcase.classname: shows file table with headers

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Page Structure file table body exists
testcase.classname: file table body exists

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: List Loading file table body transitions from loading state
testcase.classname: file table body transitions from loading state

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: List Loading file table shows files or empty message after load
testcase.classname: file table shows files or empty message after load

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: List Loading files show download links if files exist
testcase.classname: files show download links if files exist

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: List Loading table dropdown loads available tables
testcase.classname: table dropdown loads available tables

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Search & Filter typing in search input triggers file refresh
testcase.classname: typing in search input triggers file refresh

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Search & Filter clearing search shows all files again
testcase.classname: clearing search shows all files again

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Search & Filter type filter change triggers file reload
testcase.classname: type filter change triggers file reload

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Search & Filter Refresh button reloads file list
testcase.classname: Refresh button reloads file list

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Upload Form clicking Upload without file shows status message
testcase.classname: clicking Upload without file shows status message

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Upload Form choosing table enables record select if relations configured
testcase.classname: choosing table enables record select if relations configured

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Upload Form selecting a file populates the file name input
testcase.classname: selecting a file populates the file name input

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Upload Form upload attempt reaches the API and returns a status message
testcase.classname: upload attempt reaches the API and returns a status message

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Delete Guard delete button exists per file row for editor role
testcase.classname: delete button exists per file row for editor role

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Delete Guard delete button triggers confirm dialog
testcase.classname: delete button triggers confirm dialog

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Mobile loads files page on mobile
testcase.classname: loads files page on mobile

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Files: Mobile upload and search inputs exist on mobile
testcase.classname: upload and search inputs exist on mobile
